examples: Some people go back to local small businesses: the Asian greengrocer, a Greek baker, and a Greek fishmonger.
I must go down to the fishmonger 's-i need to buy some salmon for dinner.
I got the fishmonger to skin the fish which helped save on the preparation time.
And even though you won't be cooking, see what fishmonger PJ Stoops has in his case.
When choosing your fish, let the fishmonger know you intend to eat it raw.
